text:
Who would we switch Instagram accounts with? Why, @lalalalisa_m (Lisa) and @anyma (Anyma), of course вқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ”Ҙ

We met up with the duo behind вҖңBad AngelвҖқ in the desert to talk @coachella, hidden talents, go-to karaoke songs and more in this episode of Close Friends Only: Speed Round рҹҸқпёҸрҹҺЎрҹҢһ

Sticker art AND group chat lore? The @netflix вҖңRoommatesвҖқ cast said why not both.
 
@bellamurphy._ (Bella Murphy), @chloeeast (Chloe East), @jayaharper (Jaya Harper) @stormreid (Storm Reid) and Sadie Sandler got crafty with DIY dorm decor while spilling secrets.

@luisasonza (LuГӯsa Sonza) started posting covers online from her small town in Brazil. Now, sheвҖҷs performing at @coachella for the first time. рҹҸқпёҸрҹҺЎ 
 
HereвҖҷs #10Things with the BRUTAL PARAГҚSO singer: 
1. SONZACHELLA!!!
2. вҖңI started to post covers on Instagram, and I think that was the moment that everything changed in my life.вҖқ рҹҘ№
3. вҖңI would describe my style as a big mess, and I like that.вҖқ вҖјпёҸвҖјпёҸ
4. Setlist reveal рҹҺӨрҹ“’
5. Lasagna (the Brazilian way ofc) рҹҚҪпёҸ 
6. вҖңItвҖҷs just perfect.вҖқ вӯҗ
7. Meet @giselepinschers (Gisele), aka LuГӯsaвҖҷs biggest inspiration <3 
8. LuГӯsaвҖҷs вҖңmessy cute girlвҖқ festival performance looks (ft. LuГӯsaвҖҷs stylist @victorfdmiranda) рҹ‘ 
9. вҖңJust do it, girl!вҖқ рҹ«°

Kawaii core, but on a canvas рҹҺЁрҹ’«

Illustrator @mada.exe (Mada) combines her background in animation and fashion with her passion for digital art and oil painting to make her nostalgic, colorful art. 

вҖңI love looking at photo books and fashion magazines, really any type of printed media. And I really enjoy portraits and characters. But lately IвҖҷve been trying to be present and take my own reference photographs, which has been really refreshing.вҖқ

Mada aspires for her art to wrap people up in something familiar: вҖңI hope people feel something comforting when looking at my work вҖ” but also exciting, the same way I used to love watching cartoons on Saturday morning. It makes me think of sunny skies and feeling hopeful.вҖқ
 
Video by @mada.exe

@flammedenotredame (AlthГ©a) is bringing characters to life both on and off the canvas рҹ–ҢпёҸвңЁ

Meet Imani and Steve вҖ” the first two characters in an animated universe AlthГ©aвҖҷs been making from scratch. This piece captures a moment from their lives as they start to come alive. 

вҖңAt first, these characters existed in very simple, plain backgrounds. Over time, IвҖҷve been building a world that truly belongs to them and bringing them to life little by little.вҖқ

Inspired by the animated films she grew up loving, AlthГ©a creates with an imaginative mindset and hopes her work reminds people that itвҖҷs OK to feel everything: вҖңLife is made up of many different emotions, and they all have equal value. Being able to feel so deeply is a true richness.вҖқ

Video by @flammedenotredame
